---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---
```{=html}
<div style="padding:3rem 6vw; max-width:1200px; margin:0 auto;">

  <div style="margin-bottom:2.5rem;">
    <span class="f-label" style="margin-bottom:0.5rem;">// événements</span>
    <h1 style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif; font-size:clamp(1.8rem,4vw,2.8rem); font-weight:800; color:#0f172a; margin:0 0 0.5rem 0;">Conférences, meetups & hackathons</h1>
    <p style="color:#94a3b8; font-size:0.9rem; margin:0 0 2rem 0;">Événements tech à ne pas manquer — en ligne et en présentiel.</p>

    <!-- Filtres statut -->
    <div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.5rem;margin-bottom:.75rem;">
      <button class="filter-pill active btn-statut" onclick="filter('statut','all',this)">Tous</button>
      <button class="filter-pill btn-statut" onclick="filter('statut','upcoming',this)">À venir</button>
      <button class="filter-pill btn-statut" onclick="filter('statut','past',this)">Passés</button>
    </div>

    <!-- Filtres type -->
    <div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.5rem;">
      <button class="filter-pill active btn-type" onclick="filter('type','all',this)">Tous types</button>
      <button class="filter-pill btn-type" onclick="filter('type','conference',this)">Conférence</button>
      <button class="filter-pill btn-type" onclick="filter('type','meetup',this)">Meetup</button>
      <button class="filter-pill btn-type" onclick="filter('type','hackathon',this)">Hackathon</button>
      <button class="filter-pill btn-type" onclick="filter('type','webinaire',this)">Webinaire</button>
      <button class="filter-pill btn-type" onclick="filter('type','bootcamp',this)">Bootcamp</button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div id="evenements-grid" style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(300px,1fr)); gap:1.25rem;"></div>
  <p id="no-results" style="display:none; color:#94a3b8; font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.85rem; margin-top:2rem;">Aucun événement pour ces filtres.</p>

</div>

<script>
const evenements = [
  {
    title:    "SIADE 2026",
    type:     "conference",
    lieu:     "Stade Félix Houphouët-Boigny, Abidjan",
    pays:     "🇨🇮",
    date:     "2026-04-13",
    date_fin: "2026-04-14",
    url:      "https://siade.ci/",
    excerpt:  "Le plus grand rassemblement annuel dédié à l'IA, la défense et l'espace en Afrique de l'Ouest. +7000 visiteurs · 13 pays · 50+ sponsors.",
    gratuit:  false
  }
];

const today = new Date();
today.setHours(0,0,0,0);

let activeStatut = 'all';
let activeType   = 'all';

const typeLabels = {
  conference: 'Conférence',
  meetup:     'Meetup',
  hackathon:  'Hackathon',
  webinaire:  'Webinaire',
  bootcamp:   'Bootcamp'
};

const typeColors = {
  conference: { color:'#60a5fa', bg:'#60a5fa0d', border:'#60a5fa22' },
  meetup:     { color:'#34d399', bg:'#34d3990d', border:'#34d39922' },
  hackathon:  { color:'#ff4560', bg:'#ff45600d', border:'#ff456022' },
  webinaire:  { color:'#a78bfa', bg:'#a78bfa0d', border:'#a78bfa22' },
  bootcamp:   { color:'#0ea5e9', bg:'#0ea5e90d', border:'#0ea5e922' }
};

function isUpcoming(e) {
  const d = new Date(e.date_fin || e.date);
  d.setHours(23,59,59,999);
  return d >= today;
}

function formatDate(dateStr, dateFinStr) {
  const opts = { day: 'numeric', month: 'short', year: 'numeric' };
  const d1 = new Date(dateStr).toLocaleDateString('fr-FR', opts);
  if (!dateFinStr || dateFinStr === dateStr) return d1;
  const d2 = new Date(dateFinStr).toLocaleDateString('fr-FR', opts);
  return `${d1} → ${d2}`;
}

function renderEvenements(list) {
  const grid  = document.getElementById('evenements-grid');
  const noRes = document.getElementById('no-results');
  if (!list.length) { grid.innerHTML = ''; noRes.style.display = 'block'; return; }
  noRes.style.display = 'none';
  grid.innerHTML = list.map(e => {
    const c       = typeColors[e.type] || typeColors.meetup;
    const upcoming = isUpcoming(e);
    const badge   = upcoming
      ? `<span style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.62rem; letter-spacing:0.1em; text-transform:uppercase; color:#00e676;">● À venir</span>`
      : `<span style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.62rem; letter-spacing:0.1em; text-transform:uppercase; color:#94a3b8;">○ Passé</span>`;
    const gratuitBadge = e.gratuit
      ? `<span style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.62rem; color:#34d399; border:1px solid #34d39922; background:#34d3990d; padding:2px 8px; border-radius:2px;">Gratuit</span>`
      : '';
    return `
    <div style="background:#f0f9ff; border:1px solid #bae6fd; border-radius:6px; padding:1.5rem; display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:0.75rem; transition:border-color 0.2s;"
         onmouseover="this.style.borderColor='#0ea5e9'" onmouseout="this.style.borderColor='#bae6fd'">

      <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:0.5rem;">
        <div style="display:flex; gap:0.5rem; flex-wrap:wrap; align-items:center;">
          <span style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.65rem; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; color:${c.color}; border:1px solid ${c.border}; background:${c.bg}; padding:2px 8px; border-radius:2px;">
            ${typeLabels[e.type] || e.type}
          </span>
          ${gratuitBadge}
        </div>
        ${badge}
      </div>

      <h3 style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif; font-size:1rem; font-weight:700; color:#0f172a; margin:0;">${e.title}</h3>

      <p style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.72rem; color:#94a3b8; margin:0;">
        ${e.pays} ${e.lieu} &nbsp;·&nbsp; ${formatDate(e.date, e.date_fin)}
      </p>

      <p style="font-size:0.85rem; color:#475569; line-height:1.6; margin:0; flex:1;">${e.excerpt}</p>

      <a href="${e.url}" target="_blank"
         style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.72rem; color:#0ea5e9; text-decoration:none; letter-spacing:0.06em;">
        Voir l'événement →
      </a>

    </div>`;
  }).join('');
}

function filter(dim, val, btn) {
  if (dim === 'statut') {
    activeStatut = val;
    document.querySelectorAll('.btn-statut').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
  } else {
    activeType = val;
    document.querySelectorAll('.btn-type').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
  }
  btn.classList.add('active');

  let filtered = evenements;
  if (activeStatut === 'upcoming') filtered = filtered.filter(e => isUpcoming(e));
  if (activeStatut === 'past')     filtered = filtered.filter(e => !isUpcoming(e));
  if (activeType !== 'all')        filtered = filtered.filter(e => e.type === activeType);
  renderEvenements(filtered);
}

renderEvenements(evenements);
</script>
```
